headline: Why The Garmin (GRMN) Investment Narrative Is Shifting Despite An Unchanged Analyst Price Target
summary: Garmin's latest analyst update comes with no change in the stated price target, which leaves the current benchmark for the stock exactly where it was before. With no fresh commentary from covering analysts, the market is left to interpret what a stable price target might mean in the context of its own expectations. Read on to see how to track this kind of quiet shift in the analyst narrative and what to watch for as future updates come through. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the...
